message:
Fix: Update plugin.json version to 1.0.7

Missed updating .claude-plugin/plugin.json in the release process.
This ensures all plugin metadata files are synchronized with the release version.

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "name": "episodic-memory",
-  "version": "1.0.5",
+  "version": "1.0.7",
   "description": "Semantic search for Claude Code conversations. Remember past discussions, decisions, and patterns.",
   "author": {
     "name": "Jesse Vincent",
